message:
test(coordination): add 28 property tests for multi-pane coordination types

Covers serde roundtrip for all 14 serializable types (PaneGroupStrategy,
PaneGroup, GroupLockConflict, BroadcastPrecondition, PaneBroadcastOutcome,
BroadcastResult, PaneBroadcastEntry, CoordinateAgentsConfig, CoordinationResult,
GroupCoordinationEntry, UnstickFindingKind, UnstickFinding, UnstickConfig,
UnstickReport) plus behavioral invariants for counter consistency, default
configs, truncate_snippet bounds, and human_summary output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
